evals.prompt: I have a customer requirements file at customer_requirements.xlsx. Please process these requirements and create a development plan.
evals.expected_output: Reads both tabs, performs NER, audits exit criteria, produces feature summaries, excludes Done items, proposes prioritised delivery order, and enters planning mode with a development plan.

evals.prompt: Look at the customer requirements spreadsheet and tell me what needs to change for the API-related Must Do requirements.
evals.expected_output: Reads the spreadsheet, filters to Must Do + APIs Feature Category, identifies Revision scope, compares against existing codebase to determine the delta, and presents specific changes needed.

evals.prompt: Process customer_requirements.xlsx — I only care about the Must Do items that are still Open.
evals.expected_output: Reads the spreadsheet, correctly excludes Done items (refs 4 and 6), focuses on Open Must Do items, and produces a scoped plan covering only those requirements.
